REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 7/21/26. Notice of Hearing filed on 5/22/26 did not indicate that the filing is a report of the status of decedent's estate (box in Item 1 was not marked).

All documents to be filed by 7/6/26.
EXAMINER: SEAN BANG

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 9, 2012 is admitted to probate. Sarah Shilgi is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 18, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
